022111010012220002112 - ASI: 17

Rules:
  02 = 0 * 2
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  12 = 1 * 2
  20 = 2 * 0
  002 = 0 * 02
  100 = 10 * 0
  112 = 1 * 12
  211 = 2 * 11
  220 = 2 * 20
  02211 = 02 * 211
  10100 = 10 * 100
  12220 = 12 * 220
  002112 = 002 * 112
  0221110100 = 02211 * 10100
  12220002112 = 12220 * 002112
  022111010012220002112 = 0221110100 * 12220002112
